channel.title: math.GM updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.GM updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: New identities for the Laplace transform and their applications
item.description: arXiv:2405.14248v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this paper, we begin by applying the Laplace transform to derive closed forms for several challenging integrals that seem nearly impossible to evaluate. By utilizing the solution to the Pythagorean equation $a^2 + b^2 = c^2$, these closed forms become even more intriguing. This approach allows us to provide new integral representations for the error function. Additionally, by leveraging an identity we derived for the inverse Laplace transform and applying a result based on Srivastava and Y\"{u}rekli's identity, we provide a closed form for a nontrivial generalized integral.
item.arxiv:journal_reference: Integral Transforms and Special Functions 36 (2025), no. 5, 413--438
item.dc:creator: Abdulhafeez A. Abdulsalam, Ammar K. Mohammed
